title: Quick Search Location Context
summary: The Context/Search chip initially defaults to the user's current location in the DMS when they open the assistant. Dismissing the chip resets the location to the repository.
state: Completed an initial Claude code prototype
nextAction: Review Claude prototype with Zane and Brandon

log.content: Align on labeling. Do we need to say 'Context: Location' or can we just say 'Location'?
End of Q2 but ideally end of April private preview release
Location context scoped to Cabinets due to custom cabinet attributes.
For MVP, do we scoped to only a single location context chip active at a time?
What does the return response look like for contextual searches?
How might contextual search work within the quick search field and within Solstice?

We may not be able to run semantic search queries in quick search without an explicit toggle for AI Search that would treat a query as a AI Search query vs a normal query. Alternatively, we could use regex to determine if a query is a question and to use the AI Search tool.
